Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows multiple documents Document1 docx Quarterly Report docx Budget 2024 xlsx Email and PDF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cases can represent a logical unit of user work like editing a specific document handling an email or reviewing a PDF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Could define cases by document or by task such as Draft Document1 Handle Annual Meeting email Review PDF Update Budget Draft Quarterly Report

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The most coherent analyst friendly interpretation is to define cases by the primary artifact or task because the user switches across applications but returns to the same artifacts

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Document1 appears early and later again with the same window title so it is reasonable to keep it as one case with gaps rather than split it into separate cases

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: A common approach is that a case is a document being worked on from first interaction to close while email PDF and spreadsheet work become their own short cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each distinct window or task create a case and include only events where the user directly interacts with that artifact

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Better to treat each artifact separately because including other application work inside one document case would incorrectly attribute those activities

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: One option is to use switch events inside cases but better to ignore switch events and rely on direct interaction events because switch is a meta transition rather than meaningful work on the artifact

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Raw actions are low level such as focus typing save click scroll highlight and close so these need to be mapped to higher level process activities

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Focus can be mapped to Open Document or Return to Document typing to Edit Document save to Save Document click actions in email to Open Email Reply Compose and Send and scroll highlight in PDF to Review PDF and Highlight Text

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case IDs can be generated as Document1 Quarterly Report Email AnnualMeeting ReportDraft PDF and Budget 2024

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The resulting event log should retain timestamp case id and renamed activity and may also include application and window title as additional attributes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This produces a coherent event log where each case tells a compact story such as open edit save close for documents open read reply send for email review and highlight for PDF and open edit save for spreadsheet
